scenes.title: The Hunt
scenes.biggestGap: No revision changes needed; protect existing Quel'Thalas road texture and cadence.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Curated Farstrider road under Eversong canopy and ward coverage.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Fern, tack, runestone bass note, road mud.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas reads footing, patrol spacing, and border maintenance instinctively.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Banter stays attached to horses, reins, and the ward-road they are riding.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: The runner's approach breaks the patrol rhythm on Sylvanas's road.

scenes.title: The Messenger
scenes.biggestGap: No revision changes needed; preserve the living-border feel and moving-horse report texture.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: South road tightening toward the pass and ward rings.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Foam at the bit, loose gravel, chalk under stone, border wind.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas sorts the problem as a border-security failure before politics.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Runner report and split with Lor'themar stay tied to reins, motion, and the fork in the road.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Arrival pressure lands at the outpost already lit by monoliths and held by rangers.

scenes.title: The Prisoner
scenes.biggestGap: Unsourced proper nouns in the debrief create avoidable continuity surface inside an otherwise well-grounded outpost scene.

sceneContract.placeAnchor: Stone-built Farstrider outpost with ward-lit threshold and secured holding room.
sceneContract.materialAnchor: Chalk, frost, confiscated staff, focus crystals, satchel, iron bands, split knuckles.
sceneContract.povAnchor: Sylvanas judges threat, rank, and competence before motive; Jaina still reads as a security breach first.
sceneContract.dialogueAnchor: Cyndia's report and the cell approach stay tied to evidence on the ground and the confiscated gear.
sceneContract.exitAnchor: Ward-light, iron, and Jaina's damaged hands keep the interrogation hook world-bound.

revisionFocus: Replace unsourced ranger names with sourced generics.
Remove unsupported biographical specificity from Sylvanas's recognition beat.
Re-audit adjacent debrief lines for any remaining unsourced proper nouns.

transformationMoves: Replace generic or portable labels with world-bound infrastructure and institution nouns only when sourced.
Keep dialogue tethered to nearby objects, posture, and working environment rather than adding free-floating lore.
Prefer substitution and compression over expansion in already-grounded passages.
Let POV-specific appraisal carry world detail instead of explanatory narration.
